ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion where the country is located */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertility_rates" (
  "fertility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertility rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the fertility rate data */,
  "fertility_rate" TEXT /* Fertility rate category (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-4, 5-9) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_group_range" TEXT /* Age range in a structured format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "male_population" REAL /* Male population count in the age group */,
  "female_population" REAL /* Female population count in the age group */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total population count in the age group */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population count */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Rural population count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the data source */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data entry */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific data version used in the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
